privileged_info_summary: This task requires categorizing three lost CRM opportunities by assigning correct Lost Reason values. The three opportunities are: (1) Enterprise License - Summit Financial with Lost Reason 'Price too high' (supported by note mentioning competitor discount and pricing mismatch), (2) Fleet Tracking System - BlueWave Logistics with Lost Reason 'Lacking Features' (supported by note mentioning missing offline map caching feature), and (3) Cloud Storage Migration - Apex Healthcare with Lost Reason 'Budget Freeze' (supported by note mentioning budget freeze and zero available funds). All data is synthetic, created by the setup script with coherent notes that clearly justify the assigned Lost Reason values.
